seo.title: Chacho's Auto Electric | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Chacho's Auto Electric in Dallas, TX offers expert auto electric and mechanical repair services. From diagnostics to alternators, we keep you moving. Call (214) 941-3860.

hero.eyebrow: Dallas' Trusted Auto Electric Specialists Since 1989
hero.headline: Expert Auto Electric & Mechanical Repairs You Can Count On
hero.subheadline: Family-owned and operated, we deliver fast, reliable, and affordable service for all makes and models.

featureSections.title: Advanced Diagnostics & Electrical Repairs
featureSections.body: Modern vehicles rely on complex electrical systems. Our technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. From battery and alternator problems to wiring and computer modules, we restore your car's electrical health.
featureSections.cardBody: Free battery testing with any service visit. We check voltage, load, and connections to ensure reliable starts every time.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Mechanical Repairs
featureSections.body: Beyond electrical, our ASE-certified mechanics handle all major mechanical repairs. From brake jobs to engine diagnostics, we use quality parts and proven techniques to keep your vehicle running smoothly.
featureSections.cardBody: Multi-point brake inspection including pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid. Free with any repair estimate.

whyChooseUs.title: 35+ Years of Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: Our family-owned shop has been serving Dallas since 1989, earning a reputation for honest, high-quality work.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.content: All our mechanics are ASE-certified and receive ongoing training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We value your time. Most repairs are completed the same day, and we offer shuttle service to keep you moving.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty-Backed Service
whyChooseUs.description: Every repair comes with a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind. We stand behind our work.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my cars to Chacho's for over a decade. They always diagnose the problem correctly and fix it at a fair price. Highly recommend!

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or stop by for a free estimate. We're here to help.

servicesPage.intro: At Chacho's Auto Electric, we provide a full range of auto electrical and mechanical repair services for Dallas drivers. Our experienced technicians use advanced tools and quality parts to ensure your vehicle runs safely and reliably. Explore our services below.

services.title: Electrical System Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert diagnosis and repair of all vehicle electrical systems, from batteries to complex computer modules.
services.longDescription: Modern vehicles are packed with electronics. Our advanced diagnostic tools allow us to quickly identify issues with your battery, alternator, starter, wiring, sensors, and control modules. We repair or replace components using OEM-quality parts to restore performance and reliability.
benefits: Accurate diagnostics reduce guesswork and save money
Eliminates warning lights and electrical gremlins

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic scanner to read error codes and live data.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We perform targeted tests on battery, alternator, starter, and circuits to isolate the fault.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We complete the repair using quality parts, then verify the system functions correctly.

faqs.question: How do I know if my alternator is failing?
faqs.answer: Common signs include dimming headlights, a battery warning light, or difficulty starting. We can test your alternator's output quickly.

faqs.question: Do you service hybrid vehicles?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained to work on hybrid electrical systems, including battery packs and inverters.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete brake services to ensure your safety on the road, from pad replacement to full system overhauls.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. We inspect all components—pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid—and recommend the right repairs. We use premium parts and precision techniques to restore stopping power and pedal feel.
benefits: Shorter stopping distances and safer driving
Extends the life of your braking system

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We remove wheels and inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and hardware for wear and damage.

process.title: Service
process.description: We machine or replace rotors, install new pads, and lubricate caliper slides as needed.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to ensure proper operation and no noise.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We check thickness at every visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer performance brake upgrades?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can install high-performance pads and rotors for better stopping power.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Tune-Ups
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive engine diagnostics and tune-up services to improve performance and fuel economy.
services.longDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with our thorough diagnostics and tune-up services. We check spark plugs, ignition coils, fuel injectors, filters, and sensors. Using OEM specifications, we optimize timing, fuel mixture, and emissions for peak efficiency.
benefits: Reduced emissions and longer engine life

process.title: Performance Check
process.description: We measure compression, fuel pressure, and ignition output to assess engine health.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: We replace worn parts like plugs, filters, and fluids according to manufacturer schedules.

process.title: Computer Reset
process.description: We reset the ECU and test drive to confirm the tune-up restores optimal performance.

faqs.question: What are signs I need a tune-up?
faqs.answer: Rough idle, decreased gas mileage, misfires, or trouble starting are common indicators.

faqs.question: Do you service diesel engines?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on both gasoline and diesel engines, including glow plugs and injection systems.

services.title: A/C & Heating System Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with our A/C and heating repair services.
services.longDescription: A broken A/C or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control components, including compressors, condensers, evaporators, blower motors, and controls. We recharge refrigerant to factory specs and fix leaks to restore comfort.
benefits: Restores cold A/C and hot heat quickly
Eliminates strange odors and weak airflow

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant pressure, temperature output, and component operation.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: We use UV dye and electronic sniffers to find refrigerant leaks.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We replace failed parts and recharge the system to manufacturer specifications.

faqs.question: Why is my A/C blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Low refrigerant is the most common cause, but a failing compressor or electrical issue could also be the culprit.

faqs.question: How often should I service my A/C?
faqs.answer: We recommend an A/C check every two years to ensure proper refrigerant level and system health.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Care Since 1989
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto electrical and mechanical repair services to the Dallas community. We treat every customer like family and every vehicle like our own.
story: Chacho's Auto Electric was founded in 1989 by Jesus 'Chacho' Hernandez, a master technician with a passion for electrical systems. Starting in a small garage in Oak Cliff, Chacho built a reputation for solving the toughest electrical problems that other shops couldn't fix. Word spread quickly, and soon the shop expanded to serve a loyal customer base across Dallas.

Today, Chacho's sons run the business, carrying on the tradition of integrity, skill, and personal service. We've invested in the latest diagnostic technology and ongoing training for our team, but our core values remain the same: fair pricing, transparent communication, and work we're proud to stand behind.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. We explain what's needed and why, so you can make informed decisions.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only quality parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure long-lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your time and your budget. We provide accurate estimates and finish work on schedule.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a locally owned business that gives back to the Dallas community we call home.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Chacho's Auto Electric
contact.subheadline: Call, stop by, or fill out the form below. We'll get back to you fast.
